name: Beat Plan Test
query:
SELECT 
				b.retailer as id,
				b.retailer_name as name,
				b.status as status,
				b.check_in,
				b.check_out,
				IFNULL((SELECT 
                        SUM(CASE WHEN gle.posting_date <= CURDATE() THEN gle.debit - gle.credit END)
                        from `tabGL Entry` gle where gle.party = b.retailer AND gle.party_type = 'Customer' group by gle.party),0) AS outstanding_amount,
    			IFNULL((SELECT SUM(paid_amount) FROM `tabPayment Entry` where status = 'Draft' and party = b.retailer),0) AS pending_approval,
				a.name as doctype,
				IFNULL(c.long,"") as longitude,
				IFNULL(c.lat ,"") as latitude,
				b.reason,
				
				
CASE
    WHEN b.check_in IS NOT NULL AND b.check_out IS NULL THEN "OUT"
ELSE "IN"
END AS action,
CASE 
    WHEN b.check_in IS NOT NULL AND b.check_out IS NULL THEN "Check Out"
    ELSE "Check In"
END AS label,

Case When cus.credit_lock = 1 Then 
   Case When cus.payment_terms = 'IMMEDIATE' THEN 'Lock' 
        When cus.payment_terms = 'ADVANCE' THEN 'Lock' 
   Else
      case when PTD.credit_days + cus.grace_period_days + CASE WHEN  (CURDATE() + 1) < cus.valid_upto THEN cus.extra_grace_period Else 0 
		            end < DATEDIFF((CURDATE() + 1), (SELECT si.posting_date 
                                                                            FROM `tabSales Invoice` si 
                                                                            WHERE b.retailer = si.customer AND si.docstatus = 1 AND si.status = 'Overdue'
                                                                            ORDER BY si.creation ASC
                                                                            LIMIT 1)) Then  'Lock' Else 'Unlock' End
    End
 Else 'Unlock' End as "Credit Lock Status",
(SELECT DATEDIFF((CURDATE() + 1), (
            SELECT si.posting_date 
            FROM `tabSales Invoice` si 
            WHERE b.retailer = si.customer 
              AND si.docstatus = 1 
              AND si.status = 'Overdue'
            ORDER BY si.creation ASC
            LIMIT 1
        ))) AS "age"


				
			FROM `tabBeat Plan` a
			INNER JOIN `tabBeat Plan Retailers` b on b.parent = a.name
			LEFT JOIN `tabCustomer` cus on cus.name = b.retailer
			LEFT JOIN `tabPayment Terms Template` PTT On cus.payment_terms = PTT.name
  LEFT JOIN `tabPayment Terms Template Detail` PTD On PTD.parent = PTT.name
			LEFT JOIN `tabLocation` c on c.name = b.retailer_name
			where a.dsr = 'KARTHIKEYAN R'		    
			and a.beat_plan_date = CURDATE()
			order by b.retailer_name
